service_line_config.name: agentic_ai
service_line_config.tech_context: This project involves agentic AI systems. Key considerations: - Agent Frameworks: LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, custom agent loops - LLM Providers: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Azure OpenAI, self-hosted (Ollama, vLLM) - Tool Use: function calling, MCP (Model Context Protocol), custom tool definitions - Memory: conversation memory, vector stores (Pinecone, Weaviate, ChromaDB, pgvector) - RAG: retrieval-augmented generation, document chunking, embedding models, rerankers - Orchestration: multi-agent workflows, task delegation, agent communication patterns - Guardrails: input/output validation, content filtering, hallucination detection - Evaluation: LLM-as-judge, human evaluation, automated test suites - Observability: LangSmith, Langfuse, custom logging for agent traces - Cost Management: token tracking, model routing, caching strategies

artifact_overrides.module_extraction: Map modules to agent capabilities, tool integrations, or pipeline stages. Consider separating: core agent logic, tool/API integrations, memory/knowledge systems, orchestration layer, and evaluation/monitoring.
artifact_overrides.functional_req: - Specify the agent architecture: single agent, multi-agent, or hierarchical - For tool requirements, define tool schemas, input/output contracts, and error handling - For memory requirements, specify short-term (conversation) vs long-term (vector store) needs - For RAG requirements, specify data sources, chunking strategy, and retrieval approach - Define fallback behavior when LLM calls fail or produce low-quality output
artifact_overrides.nonfunctional_req: - LLM response latency targets (end-to-end agent turn time) - Token cost budgets per request/conversation/user - Hallucination rate thresholds and factual accuracy targets - Agent reliability: task completion rate, error recovery success rate - RAG retrieval accuracy: precision, recall, relevance thresholds - Guardrail effectiveness: false positive/negative rates for content filtering - Observability: full agent trace logging for debugging and audit
artifact_overrides.task: - Agent framework setup: agent definitions, prompt templates, system instructions - Tool development: tool schemas, implementations, error handling, retry logic - Memory system: vector store setup, embedding pipeline, conversation management - RAG pipeline: document ingestion, chunking, indexing, retrieval, reranking - Orchestration: multi-agent workflow, task routing, communication protocols - Guardrails: input validation, output filtering, safety checks - Evaluation: test suite development, benchmark creation, automated scoring - Observability: trace logging, token tracking, cost dashboards
artifact_overrides.test_case: - Test agent with known-answer scenarios to verify task completion accuracy - Test tool calling with valid, invalid, and edge-case inputs - Test RAG retrieval with queries that have known relevant documents - Test guardrails with adversarial inputs (prompt injection, harmful content) - Test multi-agent delegation with complex multi-step tasks - Test fallback behavior when LLM provider returns errors or timeouts - Evaluate output quality with LLM-as-judge scoring
artifact_overrides.architecture: - Agent architecture: single/multi-agent topology, delegation patterns - LLM layer: model selection, routing, fallback chains, caching - Tool architecture: tool registry, schema definitions, authentication - Memory architecture: conversation store, vector database, embedding pipeline - RAG architecture: ingestion pipeline, chunking strategy, retrieval + reranking - Orchestration: workflow engine, state management, error recovery - Guardrail architecture: input/output validation pipeline, content filters - Observability: trace collection, token metering, quality monitoring
artifact_overrides.risk_entry: - LLM provider outages or rate limiting disrupting agent availability - Hallucination causing incorrect actions or misleading information - Prompt injection attacks bypassing safety guardrails - Token cost escalation from verbose agent reasoning or retry loops - RAG retrieval returning irrelevant or outdated information - Multi-agent coordination failures causing infinite loops or deadlocks - LLM model deprecation requiring prompt and workflow migration
